metadata.description: Richmond PET Test 2 gồm Reading (32), Listening (25), Writing (3).

reading.title: Part 1: Multiple Choice (Short texts - Pictures)
reading.instruction: Questions 1-5: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.text: What does the sign mean?

options.A: All types of rubbish are accepted here.
options.B: Use the special bins here for electrical items.
options.C: Rubbish that is brought here must go in the right place.

questions.explanation:
Đáp án C đúng vì biển báo có câu "PLEASE PUT RUBBISH INTO THE CORRECT BINS" = rác phải bỏ đúng thùng/đúng loại. Paraphrase: "the correct bins" = "the right place".
- A sai: không nói nhận mọi loại rác; ngược lại yêu cầu phân loại.
- B sai: biển báo ghi "ELECTRICAL ITEMS ACCEPTED AT TOWN CENTRE SITE ONLY" nên không phải bỏ đồ điện ở đây.
Key takeaway: Ưu tiên mệnh lệnh chính (PLEASE/DO NOT/ONLY) và từ khóa điều kiện như ONLY.

questions.text: What is the message about?

options.A: There will be no classes from next week.
options.B: The teacher will be in touch when she is better.
options.C: Information about the next class will be available soon.

questions.explanation:
Đáp án C đúng vì thông báo nói buổi học bị hủy và yêu cầu theo dõi cập nhật cho các buổi sau => thông tin về buổi học tiếp theo sẽ có sớm. Paraphrase: "updates" = "information ... will be available".
- A sai: chỉ nói về buổi hiện tại, không khẳng định "từ tuần sau không có lớp".
- B sai: không nói giáo viên sẽ liên hệ trực tiếp; chỉ nhấn mạnh cập nhật chung.
Key takeaway: Không suy diễn quá mức; chọn đáp án đúng phạm vi thời gian.

questions.text: Emma wants Dario to

options.A: take her notes to the meeting about the competition.
options.B: write down information about the competition for her.
options.C: send her the competition details by Thursday.

questions.explanation:
Đáp án B đúng vì Emma không dự họp về cuộc thi và cần Dario ghi lại/nhắn lại nội dung sau cuộc họp.
- A sai: không yêu cầu mang ghi chú của Emma; Emma là người vắng mặt.
- C sai: không có hạn cố định "by Thursday" như đáp án nêu.
Key takeaway: Xác định đúng nhiệm vụ khi người viết không thể tham dự: nhờ ghi lại/tóm tắt và gửi lại.

questions.text: What does the notice say?

options.A: Everyone needs to come to the meeting.
options.B: The time of the meeting has changed.
options.C: A new project will be discussed at the meeting.

questions.explanation:
Đáp án A đúng vì thông báo yêu cầu tất cả nhân viên tham dự (all attend).
- B sai: nói là cuộc họp trưa thường lệ (regular lunchtime meeting), không nói đổi giờ.
- C sai: nói thảo luận tiến độ dự án (progress), không khẳng định dự án mới.
Key takeaway: Từ khóa "all / everyone / must" thường quyết định đáp án.

questions.text: Parents should

options.A: give the school some money for the library.
options.B: take some things to school for the sale.
options.C: offer to help at the school sale.

questions.explanation:
Đáp án B đúng vì thông báo yêu cầu "Please bring second-hand goods" để bán gây quỹ. Paraphrase: "bring ... goods" = "take some things to school".
- A sai: không yêu cầu đưa tiền trực tiếp.
- C sai: không kêu gọi tình nguyện hỗ trợ; yêu cầu cụ thể là mang đồ cũ.
Key takeaway: Phân biệt "donate money" và "bring items for a sale".

reading.title: Part 2: Matching
reading.instruction: Questions 6-10: The people below all want to have a celebration. Decide which event would be most suitable for each person.

media.content:
HAVE YOUR CELEBRATION WITH ONE OF THESE PARTY ORGANISERS!

A. Iye Valley Theme Park Parties ...
B. Hartford Hall ...
C. The Big Picnic Company ...
D. A Day with a Difference ...
E. Costume Nights ...
F. Your Concert ...
G. A Day to Remember ...
H. Mystery Games ...

options.A: Iye Valley Theme Park Parties - A day of fun at our park: amazing water ride and many other high-quality rides. Dinner in our luxury café. Plenty of challenges to take part in and more great prizes to win.
options.B: Hartford Hall - We can arrange amazing parties. We can show the film of your choice from our wide selection, with popcorn and drinks. Afterwards, we can turn the hall into a disco so you can dance.
options.C: The Big Picnic Company - We can arrange special picnics for birthdays and other celebrations in your local park. Have sandwiches delivered, plus music and activities. You can bring your own prizes. Great value.
options.D: A Day with a Difference - Celebrate in luxury. Have rides on the river, plus activities (2-3 people). Dinner for up to 60 people, then a meal and a disco with a DJ and prizes. Small deposit per person.
options.E: Costume Nights - Dress up as famous movie characters. A dance with competitions and prizes (including best costume). Dinner with live music. Low prices. In the city.
options.F: Your Concert - Meet your favourite band. Tickets and backstage passes for you and your guests. Includes drinks and refreshments. A special once-in-a-lifetime experience.
options.G: A Day to Remember - One popular event is a sports day in the town park. We arrange races and competitions, and a range of prizes. After all that, we can offer an evening meal and cold drinks.
options.H: Mystery Games - Turn your party into a mystery game in a big house. Use clues and props to solve the mystery, including a special meal during which the mystery is explained.

questions.text: Hannah wants to celebrate her 15th birthday with her friends. They enjoy being outdoors and having fun together. She wants some snacks to be provided but doesn't have much money.
questions.explanation: C đúng vì "in your local park" (outdoors) + "sandwiches delivered" (snacks) + "Great value" (không nhiều tiền). Key takeaway: đối chiếu địa điểm + hoạt động + điều kiện đặc biệt (giá/đồ ăn).

questions.text: Leon would like to do something with his friends. They all really enjoy watching movies and listening to live music, and they like being active.
questions.explanation: E đúng vì có "movie characters" (movie) + "live music" + "a dance"/competitions (active). Key takeaway: yêu cầu 2 sở thích cùng lúc -> chọn đáp án có đủ cả hai.

questions.text: Paola has saved money to have a big party where she can dance with her friends. She likes competitions and wearing interesting clothes, and wants to have a special meal.
questions.explanation: E đúng vì dance + competitions/prizes + dress up + dinner. Key takeaway: đáp án đúng thường khớp 3-4 từ khóa trực tiếp.

questions.text: Chris wants an event where he and his friends can spend the day doing water sports. He would also like to invite extra guests for dinner and a dance.
questions.explanation: D đúng vì "rides on the river" (trải nghiệm nước) + "dinner" + "disco" (dance). Key takeaway: có dinner + dance -> ưu tiên mục có cấu trúc buổi tối rõ (dinner + disco/DJ).

questions.text: Pablo wants to spend a day out with friends away from the town, having fun rides and the opportunity for some competitions. He also wants to have some soft food.
questions.explanation: A đúng vì theme park (day out) + rides + challenges (competitions) + dinner in café (đồ ăn). Key takeaway: đề nêu rõ "rides" -> khoanh nhóm công viên/giải trí.

reading.title: Part 3: Multiple Choice (Reading Comprehension)
reading.instruction: Questions 11-15: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The writer thinks that helping the environment seems difficult because

options.A: individual action has limited positive benefits.
options.B: it is such a huge problem.
options.C: it is too late to improve things.
options.D: large organisations have failed to even try.

questions.explanation: B đúng vì đoạn 1: "a huge, impossible challenge" = vấn đề quá lớn. - A sai: tác giả nói hành động nhỏ vẫn có tác động lớn. - C sai: không nói quá muộn. - D sai: không nói tổ chức lớn không cố gắng. Key takeaway: tìm cụm đánh giá (huge/impossible) và chọn đáp án diễn đạt lại đúng mức độ.

questions.text: The writer was unhappy because

options.B: he lost a lot of soil from his land.
options.C: trees began to die on hills near his home.
options.D: lots of his plants were killed.

questions.explanation: D đúng vì đoạn 2: "Many didn't survive" (nhiều cây không sống được). - A sai: tác giả nói "I didn't mind the water". - B sai: có nhắc soil nhưng cảm xúc mạnh nằm ở hậu quả cây chết. - C sai: cây bị removed, không phải began to die. Key takeaway: tránh bẫy word-spotting; bám câu thể hiện hậu quả chính.

questions.text: The writer got the money to buy trees for the hill near his house by

options.A: charging tourists to visit the area.
options.B: talking to a local business person.
options.C: persuading his neighbours to give some.

questions.explanation: B đúng vì đoạn 3: "one cafe owner agreed to give us the cash" (chủ quán cà phê đưa tiền). - A/C/D sai vì không có chi tiết thu phí du khách / hàng xóm góp tiền / bán cây. Key takeaway: câu hỏi "got the money" -> tìm động từ tiền tệ (cash/money/give).

questions.text: The community was able to start bee keeping because

options.A: someone in the village had experience of this.
options.C: a group went to classes to learn how to do it.
options.D: they found some bees in the nearby forest.

questions.explanation: A đúng vì đoạn 4: "A friend ... is an expert. He taught us". - B/C/D sai vì không có. Key takeaway: câu hỏi because -> bám nguyên nhân trực tiếp (expert taught us).

questions.text: What would the writer say to a friend about his work for the environment?

options.A: It's strange to think that just finding some interesting information on the internet led to this amazing project!
options.B: We've grown a variety of different kinds of plants: trees to protect the land and flowers to bring in the insects.
options.C: It took a while to get my neighbours to join me, but now I'm just as excited as I am about the changes we're seeing!
options.D: My own experience proves that even if you don't live somewhere directly affected by problems, it's still worth trying to make a situation better.

questions.explanation: D đúng vì thông điệp xuyên suốt: "even small actions can have a big effect" và "everyone can do something". - A/B/C không phải thông điệp chính. Key takeaway: câu hỏi "What would the writer say?" thường kiểm tra message tổng quát.

reading.title: Part 4: Gapped Text
reading.instruction: Questions 16-20: Five sentences have been removed from the text. Choose the correct sentence (A-H) for each gap. There are three extra sentences you do not need.

media.content:
THE CHEF: HOW I GOT STARTED

When I was quite small, I used to help my parents and grandparents in the kitchen by cutting the vegetables and doing anything else I could help with. (16) I used to love watching him eat it and I realised that I could make people really happy. My parents were worried about me using knives, but I soon became very confident at peeling and chopping. But I suppose I didn't really start cooking for myself until I went to university. (17) I think they were just grateful that someone had cooked them a meal, but it taught me a lot about cooking on a budget.

After university, I think my parents expected me to work in business, but I was keen to do some travelling. I went abroad for about six months and I picked up odd jobs in kitchens as I went around the world. I developed a real interest in all sorts of amazing foods and the different methods of cooking them. (18) Eventually I became confident enough to try new things there, and the customers liked them. We had some good reviews and so I was offered a job at a big restaurant in the capital.

I still really enjoy cooking. The kitchen is so busy you don't get much time to do anything else, but I'm glad that people I know and who eat my food. I've passed this on to my children now. I get them to help me at home. (19) That means I have a nice break from cooking. They're learning to invent their own dishes now, rather than just following a recipe. (20) I like to see their passion for cooking, even after all these years of working long hours in a kitchen.

Sentences to choose from:
A. Sadly, I wasn't able to get a job at that restaurant.
B. Sometimes they make the whole lunch for us all.
C. One of my earliest memories is cooking fish for my grandfather.
D. This is why I think my grandfather is the most creative cook.
E. When I came home, I got a cooking job at a small local restaurant.
F. There's nothing wrong with doing that sometimes, but it's good to be creative too.
G. Although I didn't have much money I saved enough for my trip.
H. I used to try out new dishes on my friends.

options.A: Sadly, I wasn't able to get a job at that restaurant.
options.B: Sometimes they make the whole lunch for us all.
options.C: One of my earliest memories is cooking fish for my grandfather.
options.D: This is why I think my grandfather is the most creative cook.
options.E: When I came home, I got a cooking job at a small local restaurant.
options.F: There's nothing wrong with doing that sometimes, but it's good to be creative too.
options.G: Although I didn't have much money I saved enough for my trip.
options.H: I used to try out new dishes on my friends.

questions.text: Gap 16
questions.explanation: C đúng vì sau gap có "him" và "watching him eat it" -> đang nói về ông (grandfather) và kỷ niệm nấu ăn thời nhỏ. Key takeaway: dùng đại từ tham chiếu (him/it) để tìm câu có cùng đối tượng.

questions.text: Gap 17
questions.explanation: H đúng vì bối cảnh university + sau đó có "they were just grateful" (they = friends) -> nấu thử món mới cho bạn. Key takeaway: xác định chủ ngữ ẩn (they) và bối cảnh (university).

questions.text: Gap 18
questions.explanation: E đúng vì sau gap có "there" cần 1 địa điểm cụ thể để tham chiếu (small local restaurant). Key takeaway: chú ý từ chỉ nơi chốn (there) và tiến trình nghề nghiệp.

questions.text: Gap 19
questions.explanation: B đúng vì sau gap có "That means I have a nice break from cooking" -> nếu con làm cả bữa trưa thì người kể được nghỉ nấu. Key takeaway: "That means..." thường yêu cầu câu trước tạo ra kết quả đó.

questions.text: Gap 20
questions.explanation: F đúng vì trước gap nói "invent their own dishes ... rather than just following a recipe" -> F bình luận: theo recipe cũng được nhưng sáng tạo tốt hơn. Key takeaway: cấu trúc đối lập "rather than" thường đi kèm câu nhận xét tổng quát.

reading.title: Part 5: Multiple-Choice Cloze
reading.instruction: Questions 21-26: For each question, choose the correct answer (A, B, C or D).

media.content:
CAN YOU BELIEVE WHAT'S IN A TEXT?

A new study of 140 students shows that people are more likely to lie when texting than when they are speaking to someone face-to-face. Each student was asked to take out (21) ______ in a situation where they were either selling or buying a product. The results (22) ______ that the sellers were much more likely to lie if they were trying to (23) ______ someone to buy by text message. This is perhaps because the person you are 'talking' to cannot look at your face or body language to (24) ______ whether you are lying or not. What was also interesting was that the buyers were angrier when they lied by text than face-to-face. Authors of the study (25) ______ that this is because when you meet someone in person, you have a relationship that helps prevent you from getting so angry. The (26) ______ was that customers shouldn't trust text messages!

questions.text: Gap 21
questions.explanation: B đúng vì collocation (ngữ cảnh mô phỏng): "take out a role" (đảm nhận vai trò) theo key bài. Key takeaway: chú ý cụm cố định theo key của đề.

questions.text: Gap 22
questions.explanation: C đúng vì mẫu học thuật chuẩn: "The results showed that ...".

questions.text: Gap 23
questions.explanation: A đúng vì cấu trúc: persuade + O + to V (persuade someone to buy).

questions.text: Gap 24
questions.explanation: D đúng vì cấu trúc: decide whether + clause (xác định xem ... hay không).

questions.text: Gap 25
questions.explanation: B đúng vì mẫu văn phong nghiên cứu: "Authors suggest that ...".

questions.text: Gap 26
questions.explanation: A đúng vì cụm chuẩn: "The conclusion was that ...".

reading.title: Part 6: Open Cloze
reading.instruction: Questions 27-32: For each question, write the correct answer. Write ONE word for each gap.

media.content:
SAILING

I recently tried a new sport and I enjoyed it so much that I want to recommend it to you.
Last week I went sailing (27) ______ the first time and it was wonderful. My friends and I set off from the harbour in a boat (28) ______ was quite small. It was very slow at first because (29) ______ wasn't much wind, but then the wind got stronger and soon the boat was racing along.
Although we (30) ______ had a different job on the boat, it was important for us to work together.
What was great was that we could visit places you can only reach by boat, so we stopped at an island (31) ______ explore and have lunch.
At the end of the day we (32) ______ really tired but we had such a good time, I suggest you try it - it's such fun!

questions.text: Last week I went sailing (27) ______ the first time and it was wonderful.
questions.explanation: Cụm cố định: for the first time.

questions.text: My friends and I set off from the harbour in a boat (28) ______ was quite small.
questions.explanation: Mệnh đề quan hệ xác định cho vật: that/which đều dùng được (tùy hệ thống chấm).

questions.text: It was very slow at first because (29) ______ wasn't much wind.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc tồn tại: There wasn't much wind.

questions.text: Although we (30) ______ had a different job on the boat, it was important for us to work together.
questions.explanation: Each had = mỗi người có một nhiệm vụ khác nhau.

questions.text: ..., so we stopped at an island (31) ______ explore and have lunch.
questions.explanation: To + V chỉ mục đích: stopped ... to explore.

questions.text: At the end of the day we (32) ______ really tired ...
questions.explanation: We + were (quá khứ của be).

listening.title: Full Listening Script (Reference)
listening.instruction: Full audio script for Listening Test 2 (all parts).
listening.transcript:
Preliminary English Test - Listening Test 2
Audio Script

Part 1
... (scriptFull preserved as provided) ...
That is the end of the test.

listening.title: Part 1: Multiple Choice (Pictures)
listening.instruction: Questions 1-7: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.explanation: Đáp án A đúng vì "Could you bring it" (it = torch) và người phụ nữ đáp: "I'll make a note so I won't forget." => cô ấy sẽ mang torch.
Đáp án C đúng vì: "...keep fit though by doing some dancing." => hobby mới là dancing.
Đáp án B đúng vì họ chọn phim "ends at half past eight" (8:30), là phim comedy.
Đáp án A đúng vì: "especially the bracelets... Mum doesn't wear rings." => chọn bracelet.
Đáp án C đúng vì "the art museum's open" và "I'd prefer to see paintings" => đi art museum.
Đáp án B đúng vì lộ trình: railway station -> bridge -> crossroads turn right -> post office -> near roundabout; thấy playground là đi quá.
Đáp án B đúng vì "the swimming pool won't be ready to open again until Monday 24th August" => bể bơi đóng.

listening.title: Part 2: Multiple Choice (Short Dialogues)
listening.instruction: Questions 8-13: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.text: What does the man do during the conversation?

options.A: informs the woman that arrangements have changed
options.B: reminds the woman to take something
options.C: tells the woman the reason behind a decision

questions.explanation: C đúng vì anh ấy đưa lý do: "because of roadworks... don't want to miss the plane".

questions.text: What do they agree is most important?
questions.explanation: A đúng vì: "It's who you're with that matters."

questions.text: What does the man think about the recycling bins?

options.A: The bins are not in the best location.
options.B: Most people don't put things in the correct bins.
options.C: It's hard to decide which bin to use for different things.

questions.explanation: B đúng vì: "They put things in the wrong place."

questions.text: How does the woman feel about the concert tonight?

options.A: surprised about the choice of music
options.B: disappointed by the number of performers
options.C: excited about the quality of sound in the theatre

questions.explanation: A đúng vì: "an unusual selection ... I didn't expect."

questions.text: What is the woman's opinion of it?
questions.explanation: C đúng vì: "I did enjoy all the different movements we did."

questions.text: The girl wants her brother to

options.C: get some advice from a trainer

questions.explanation: C đúng vì: "talk to one of the instructors ... give you some ideas."

listening.title: Part 3: Note Completion (Gap Fill)
listening.instruction: Questions 14-19: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.

questions.text: Builders have repaired the roof above the (14) ________.
questions.explanation: Script: "the section of roof over the showers".

questions.text: The walls of the (15) ________ have been painted yellow.
questions.explanation: Script: "The changing rooms ... We've painted them yellow".

questions.text: The box for members' comments is now next to the (16) ________.
questions.explanation: Script: "now we've put it beside the lift".

questions.text: There is a display of old-fashioned (17) ________.
questions.explanation: Script: "we found some old tennis kit ... put it all in a display".

questions.text: The members' kitchen has got a new (18) ________.
questions.explanation: Script: "we've put in a microwave".

questions.text: The new spaces in the car park are for members with (19) ________.
questions.explanation: Script: "spaces for people who are bringing their children".

listening.title: Part 4: Multiple Choice (Interview)
listening.instruction: Questions 20-25: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.text: What did Polly like most about travelling by train?

options.B: the variety of views she could see
options.C: how easy it is to get to the centre of cities

questions.explanation: B đúng vì: "changing landscapes, which was the nicest thing."

questions.text: What did Polly worry about before she started the journey?

options.A: having enough money during the trip
options.B: seeing the best sights in each area
options.C: getting on with everyone in her group

questions.explanation: A đúng vì: "deciding how much we should spend each day" / "afford everything".

questions.text: Polly says the most interesting thing about staying on a boat was

options.A: finding ways to manage in a small space
options.B: learning about the history of canals

questions.explanation: A đúng vì: "the challenge ... with limited room."

questions.text: How did Polly feel about visiting the museum?

options.A: embarrassed by her lack of knowledge
options.B: curious about the people who went there

questions.explanation: C đúng vì: "exhibitions were so well designed and clear."

questions.text: What does Polly recommend to people making a similar journey?
questions.explanation: B đúng vì: "Take a chess set or cards".

questions.text: Polly thinks the best holidays are those that

options.A: allow you the opportunity to relax
options.B: offer you lots of different experiences
options.C: give you the chance to change your plans

questions.explanation: B đúng vì: "have variety ... not doing the same thing every day."

writing.title: Part 1: Email
writing.instruction: You must answer this question. Write your answer in about 100 words.

questions.text:
Read this email from your English-speaking friend Jamie, and the notes you have made.

From: Jamie
Subject: New sports centre

Hi!
I hope you're still able to come with me to try classes at the new sports centre next Tuesday.
We can easily walk to the sports centre from where you live. Shall I come and meet you at your house? We can walk there together.
The two classes we could choose from are badminton and yoga. Which would you prefer to go to?
What would you like to do after the class?
See you soon
Jamie

Notes: Yes! / No, because... / Suggest...

writing.title: Part 2: Article
writing.instruction: Choose ONE question. Write your answer in about 100 words.

questions.text:
You see this notice on an English-language website for young people.

Articles wanted!
AN EXCITING PLACE TO VISIT
What is the most exciting place to visit near where you live?
Why is it so exciting?
What is the best time of year to visit this place?
Write an article answering these questions and we'll put it on our website!

writing.title: Part 2: Story
writing.instruction: Choose ONE question. Write your answer in about 100 words.

questions.text:
Your English teacher has asked you to write a story. Your story must begin with this sentence:

As I began to open the large wooden box, something inside it moved.
